results.coverage: SKILL.md covers ListReport and ObjectPage floorplans in the Application Generation section (lines 83-89), manifest.json in the generated project structure (line 103), and references/annotations.md includes UI.LineItem annotation patterns in both CDS and XML format. Page Editor section covers Object Page header/sections/footer configuration.
results.gaps: No explicit @UI.lineItem CDS annotation syntax in SKILL.md itself — it is in references/annotations.md which is properly linked.

results.coverage: SKILL.md has a dedicated 'Fiori Launchpad Configuration' section (lines 232-247) covering Semantic Object, Action, Title, Subtitle parameters. references/deployment.md contains the full crossNavigation/inbounds/semanticObject manifest.json configuration block (lines 331-334). The FLP command is listed in Quick Start Commands.
results.gaps: The crossNavigation JSON structure is only in references/deployment.md, not in SKILL.md directly, but the reference is accessible.

results.coverage: SKILL.md mentions Custom Column in the Page Editor Extension-Based Elements table (line 135) and references/page-editor.md covers adding custom columns with XML fragments. references/annotations.md has UI.LineItem patterns.
results.gaps: Missing @UI.dataPoint and criticality annotation patterns. The annotations reference covers LineItem but lacks DataPoint and Criticality vocabulary examples. The custom column section focuses on fragment-based extensions (OData V4) rather than annotation-driven custom columns with criticality indicators.
results.recommendation: Add @UI.DataPoint and Criticality annotation examples to references/annotations.md. Include a section showing how to add criticality-based status indicators to LineItem columns, which is a very common Fiori Elements pattern.

improvement_recommendations: Add @UI.DataPoint annotation patterns with Criticality to references/annotations.md — this is one of the most common Fiori Elements annotation patterns for status visualization.
Consider adding a 'Common Annotation Recipes' section covering LineItem + DataPoint + Criticality combinations, which are frequently requested together.
